   INPUT FILE  sectional/sectionalSettings.in                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  


                     GENPOL 



 Unsteady for all runs.
 Iterations/time step              =     10
 Skip tolerance (single grid cells only) =    0.100E-02

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 Laminar flame with full chemistry. 

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    Program Control

   Trajectories   Dispersion   Combustion      Radiation
      F              F              T              F

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  Input temperatures in DEGREES KELVIN     
  Output temperatures in DEGREES KELVIN     

SPECIES OUTPUT UNITS are: mol/mol   

 Phimax threshold for normalised residuals res/phimax is    0.100E-08

 Fraction of phi movement down, fraction of phimagnitude movement up     0.00        0.00    

 NO restriction on phi movement down.

 NO restriction on phi movement up.

 Species URF default      1.00000

 Thermo data, default Tcommon is   1000.

 dfdQ Allocations 
 nqlasta         463
 nqsp1a           10
